ambiguities.intent: Output Customer Code as a string in output_03.

ambiguities.source_text: Change the date to be the day of the week
ambiguities.ref:
df["Transaction Date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["Transaction Date"], format="%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S")
df["Transaction Date"] = df["Transaction Date"].dt.day_name()

ambiguities.source_text: Split the Transaction Code to extract the letters at the start of the transaction code.

ambiguities.intent: Sort output_01 by Bank; output_02 by Bank, Online or In-Person, Transaction Date; and output_03 by Bank, Customer Code.
ambiguities.ref:
output_01 = output_01.sort_values("Bank")
output_02 = output_02.sort_values(["Bank", "Online or In-Person", "Transaction Date"])
output_03 = output_03.sort_values(["Bank", "Customer Code"])
